title: The API-Driven Spiral of IT Capacity Demand
description: This flowchart illustrates the self-reinforcing cycle of demand generated by social websites and open APIs, demonstrating the continuous pressure on IT capacity planning.
relationships: Platform provides Open API -> Third-party apps consume API -> Apps create enhanced user experience -> Increased user engagement -> More API calls -> Increased load on IT Infrastructure -> Capacity must be scaled -> Platform enhances API/features (loop back to start)
